title: gate_plan
description: The gate planner's choice for an ad hoc Cherny loop goal.

gate_mode.description: The checker shape: script, agent review, or both.

gate_command.description: Shell command for script/hybrid gates; empty for pure agent gates.

artifact.description: Best artifact path to inspect or edit, when implied by the goal.

prompt_focus.description: Focused reviewer instruction for agent/hybrid gates.

reason.description: Why this gate proves the goal is done.
